HOME.HERO_TITLE: Focused Android tools for readers, covers, and files.
HOME.HERO_BODY: Sheldrapps builds simple independent apps for e-reader covers, EPUB files, PDFs, and practical digital workflows.
HOME.HERO_SIDE_BADGE: Clean interfaces, focused features, and local-first flows.
HOME.SUMMARY_TITLE: Independent software for readers, creators, and everyday users.
HOME.SUMMARY_BODY: Sheldrapps creates simple mobile tools for books, covers, files, and practical digital workflows.
HOME.APPS_SECTION_BODY: Focused tools for customizing covers, EPUB files, and reading workflows.

CCFK.NAME: Cover Creator for Kindle
CCFK.DESCRIPTION: Create e-reader covers from your images in just a few taps.

ECC.NAME: EPUB Cover Changer
ECC.DESCRIPTION: Replace EPUB covers and export updated files.

PCM.NAME: PDF Cover Maker
PCM.DESCRIPTION: Change PDF cover images and export cleaner reading files.

EPF.NAME: EPUB Fixer
EPF.DESCRIPTION: Repair EPUB files and export fixed copies.

FOCUSED.TITLE: Focused
FOCUSED.BODY: Each app solves a specific problem without bloated features.

READER_FIRST.TITLE: Reader-first
READER_FIRST.BODY: Tools are shaped around real reading and publishing tasks.

PRIVACY_AWARE.TITLE: Privacy-aware
PRIVACY_AWARE.BODY: File handling stays local whenever possible and policies stay transparent.

HOME.SUPPORT_BODY: Need help with one of our apps? Contact us at
HOME.LEGAL_CCFK_LINK: Privacy Policy - Cover Creator for Kindle

CCFK.TITLE: Privacy Policy - Cover Creator for Kindle
CCFK.INTRO: Cover Creator for Kindle (the App) is developed and maintained by Sheldrapps. This Privacy Policy explains how information is handled when you use the App.
CCFK.SECTION_1_BODY: The App does not require account creation and does not directly collect personally identifiable information such as your name, email address, or phone number.
CCFK.SECTION_2_ITEM_1: Images you select are processed locally on your device.
CCFK.SECTION_2_ITEM_2: The App does not upload or store your images on external servers.
CCFK.SECTION_2_ITEM_3: Generated files remain on your device unless you explicitly share them.
CCFK.SECTION_3_BODY: The App may display ads using Google AdMob. AdMob may collect and process certain data such as device identifiers, approximate location (country/region), and ad interaction data (impressions/clicks) to deliver and measure advertising.
CCFK.SECTION_4_BODY: Where required by law (for example, in the EEA/UK/Switzerland), the App uses Google's User Messaging Platform (UMP) to request consent for personalized advertising.
CCFK.SECTION_4_ITEM_1: You can accept or decline personalized advertising.
CCFK.SECTION_4_ITEM_2: You can review or change your choices via the App's Privacy options (when available).
CCFK.SECTION_4_ITEM_3: If consent is not granted, ads may still be shown in a non-personalized form.
CCFK.SECTION_5_BODY: We do not sell personal information. Data may be processed by third-party services strictly for providing ads and complying with legal requirements.
CCFK.SECTION_6_BODY: The App processes images locally to minimize exposure. We take reasonable measures to protect information handled by the App.
CCFK.SECTION_7_BODY: You are solely responsible for the content of images and files you process through the App, including cover images and generated files.
CCFK.SECTION_7_ITEM_1: The App does not analyze, validate, or monitor the content of files or images you process.
CCFK.SECTION_7_ITEM_2: We do not verify copyright ownership, publication rights, or licenses for any content.
CCFK.SECTION_7_ITEM_3: You must ensure you have the necessary rights and permissions for any content you process.
CCFK.SECTION_7_ITEM_4: We are not responsible for any legal issues arising from your use of copyrighted or unauthorized content.
CCFK.SECTION_8_BODY: The App is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
CCFK.SECTION_9_BODY: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a new "Last updated" date.
CCFK.SECTION_10_BODY: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact:
